description:
2024 Honda Civic Type R, 2.0L I4, FWD, 315 bhp, 6 Speed Manual. AED 155,000 or AED 2,428 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 17,870 KMs - Honda Warranty Valid Until March 2027 (Extendable) - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Carbon Aero Spoiler - Carbon Gear Shift Knob - Xpel PPF - Sports Bucket Seats - Type "R" Mode - Alcantara Steering Wheel - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation - Apple Carplay - Power Folding Mirrors - Rev Matching Funcion - Red Brembo Brake Calipers - Red Seatbelts - 19" Satin Black Alloy Wheels
